{{Infobox group
| name = Damascan Travelers
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] had a final showdown with the [[Damascan Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c6">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] was potentially under attack by [[Damascan Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Damascan Travelers]] were unable to oppose the attack by the [[Elysian Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
